description: Safe checked-in docs and structured validation reports for the WorkflowAssistant training path. Excludes logs, outputs, exports, runtime registry files, secrets, and machine-local state.

questions.prompt: How do I run the main Unsloth_Core workflow from the repo root?
Which top-level folders matter most when I am tracing the training pipeline?
What is the canonical 4-stage pipeline in this repository?
Which quick commands should I run before I start a long NPC training session?
Where should I look first in the docs for CLI usage, training, export, or frontend dashboard details?
Which command validates a subject spec before generation or training?
How do I run generate, sanitize, train, and smoke test from `./ucore`?
How do I compare or evaluate trained models from the CLI?
What fields must a valid `subjects/*.json` spec contain?
How should `dataset.examples_per_category` be shaped in a subject spec?
Where do `train.jsonl`, `validation.jsonl`, and `train_clean.jsonl` live in the canonical dataset layout?
What does one ChatML training record look like in this project?
When should I use `docs`, `notebooklm`, `ollama`, or `template` for dataset generation?
How do I train from a subject spec with a preset?
How do I validate the resolved training config before running a job?
What does `validate-config` check before training starts?
When should I require canonical dataset paths during validation?
What does the `notebooklm` technique require before dataset generation can succeed?
When should I choose the `ollama` technique instead of a docs-backed or NotebookLM-backed dataset?
How do I export a trained adapter to GGUF and where does it land?
How do I compare a candidate model against a baseline in this repo?
How do I start the frontend dashboard and what does it orchestrate?
What reliability guarantees does the frontend dashboard provide for workflow jobs?
What are the key components of the Unity NPC LLM Training Dashboard?
Which frontend dashboard files should I inspect first when debugging workflow execution?
What changed in the dashboard stage-marker and stop behavior hardening?
Why can a pipeline fail early at the dataset stage without falsely advancing later stages?
